headline: How The PPL (PPL) Investment Story Is Shifting After Recent Pennsylvania Decisions
summary: The average analyst fair value estimate for PPL has edged lower from about US$41.53 to US$41.20 per share, a small reset rather than a major call on the stock. This shift lines up with research houses fine tuning their models around recent Pennsylvania regulatory decisions, with some analysts trimming targets while others see the approved rate settlement as workable. Read on to see what is driving these moves and how you can keep track of the evolving PPL narrative over time. Analyst Price...
